claim: deaths come from the lunge, not a shoulder-brush
detail: contact damage is state-blind (full radius in seek/recover)

claim: duck windup pulse is visible (no alpha clamp, amp >= 0.4)
turrets telegraph >= 0.3s in real time before firing
detail: no turret aim phase — bolts appear unannounced

claim: duck hitbox matches its 8x6 sprite (no phantom vertical hits)
killing freezes the frame harder than being hit
intro does not gate play behind a long crawl
a fight room is always adjacent to the start room
detail: treasure/TOLL can sit next to start -> combat-free opening

claim: floor-1 suicide laps cannot buy permanent boons
enemies do not collapse to one-shots by depth 4
detail: duck hp expr: 3; sword cap absent

claim: you cannot slash enemies through solid walls
detail: slash is distance+arc only — kills through pillars

claim: slash reach does not trivially out-range contact
detail: reach 8.5 - contact 4.6 = 3.9 cells of free-hit margin

claim: interrupt farming does not inflate PLUMA
dash farming does not inflate UMBRA
mowing grass alone does not buy an A from AURUM
